basic_details.job_title: CSIR-NEERI Project Scientist-I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: CSIR-National Environmental Engineering Research Institute (CSIR-NEERI) Project Scientist-I Notification 2026 has been released through Advertisement No. RECRUIT_SD_9A_EBD_03062026 on the official website of CSIR-NEERI. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CSIR-NEERI Project Scientist-I Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in Life Science/Biotechnology OR M.E./ M. Tech. / Integrated Masters in Engineering or Technology in Biotechnology AND 4 years experience in Research and Development in Industrial and Academic Institutions or Science and Technology Organizations and Scientific activities and services
qualification.details: Ph.D. in Life Science/Biotechnology OR M.E./ M. Tech. / Integrated Masters in Engineering or Technology in Biotechnology AND 4 years experience in Research and Development in Industrial and Academic Institutions or Science and Technology Organizations and Scientific activities and services

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR-NEERI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CSIR-NEERI Project Scientist-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the CSIR-NEERI Project Scientist-I recruitment is 10th June 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies available for the Project Scientist-I post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy available for the Project Scientist-I position in the CSIR-NEERI recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Scientist-I role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. in Life Science/Biotechnology OR M.E./ M. Tech. / Integrated Masters in Engineering or Technology in Biotechnology, along with 4 years of relevant research and development experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Project Scientist-I position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Scientist-I position is 35 years. Specific age relaxations may apply as per government rules, which can be found in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Scientist-I post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Scientist-I position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 56,000/- per month, plus House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for CSIR-NEERI Project Scientist-I recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q7. How will candidates be selected for the Project Scientist-I position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Scientist-I position will be based on an Online Interview. Candidates shortlisted based on their applications will be called for the interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No, this is a contractual position. The job type for the Project Scientist-I post is contractual, meaning it is for a fixed term as per the project requirements.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is highly recommended to read the notification thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the CSIR-NEERI Project Scientist-I recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to fill out and submit their applications through the official website or the provided online application link.
